arts.ttl: Manchester City: a $160 million crisis caused by one man
arts.sum: Name Transfer fee (M$) Add-ons (M$) From Omar Marmoush 78.78 5.25 Eintracht Frankfurt Abdukodir Khusanov 42.01 10.5 Lens Vitor Reis 36.76 - Palmeiras Juma Bah* 6.3 - Real Valladolid And there’s more to come, with the official announcement of the controversial signing of 18-year-old Juma Bah from Real Valladolid and the much-anticipated replacement for Rodri Hernández, whose injury has sent City into an unexpected crisis, still pending.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola starts two new Man City signings against Chelsea
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola named two of Man City's three January signings in the starting XI against Chelsea.

arts.ttl: Report: Chelsea may 'accelerate' interest in signing teenage striker who made his senior debut in November
arts.sum: Chelsea are reportedly interested in signing a young striker who’s only just made a first-team breakthrough at his club. Many Blues fans would love to...

arts.ttl: Sky Sports forced to issue Man City apology after pundit comment amid 115 charges verdict wait
arts.sum: Manchester City news as Sky Sports left to offer on-air apology following financial comments made by pundit Tim Sherwood

arts.ttl: Manchester City v Chelsea: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Updates on the 5.30pm kick-off at the Etihad Any comments. Feel free to email Scott Pre-match reading. Manchester City hand debuts to striker Omar Marmoush and defender Abdukodir Khusanov. They’re two of three changes to the starting XI after the 4-2 capitulation at Paris Saint-Germain, the other player coming in being İlkay Gündoğan. Out-of-sorts captain Kevin De Bruyne and Savinho drop to the bench, while Rúben Dias misses out altogether. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Fernandez, Marmoush, Khusanov, Reis: Any surprises in Man City, Chelsea XIs?
arts.sum: Manchester City, Chelsea announce their first XIs for Saturday's Premier League fixture.

arts.ttl: Fit-again Miedema a tonic for troubled Man City
arts.sum: There is light at the end of the tunnel for injury-hit Manchester City in the form of Vivianne Miedema, who looks close to her best after three months out.

arts.ttl: Manchester City vs Chelsea - Premier League: Live score, team news and updates as Pep Guardiola's men looking to bounce back from PSG defeat against injury struck Blues
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest score, team news and updates as Manchester City host Chelsea at the Etihad in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Joao Felix left out of Chelsea squad for Man City clash with club granting leave
arts.sum: Joao Felix has only played 12 games for the Blues since sealing a £46million move from Atletico Madrid last summer and has been linked with a move away from Stamford Bridge this week

arts.ttl: Sky Sports forced to apologise to Man City live on air after controversial comments
arts.sum: Manchester City made three signings this month as Omar Marmoush, Vitor Reis and Abdukodir Khusanov all arrived at the Etihad, with Sky Sports pundit Tim Sherwood saying the club "make their own rules up"
